results.evidence: plugin-copier.ts:644-647 normalizeSkillFrontmatter() injects name: from directory name
plugin-copier.ts:649-673 extractFirstContentLine() derives description from body
plugin-copier.ts:606-642 CLAUDE_FIELDS + HOOKS_BLOCK_RE stripped in normalizeSkillFrontmatter()
plugin-copier.ts:767-772 only SKILL.md triggers normalization, other files use raw copyFileSync
update.ts:88-91 no args defaults to all lockfile skills
source-fetcher.ts:193-236 fetchLocal() reads from findCoreSkillsDir() plugin cache
update.ts:149-153 SHA match triggers skip with continue
update.ts:210 ensureFrontmatter(fileContent, name) applied to SKILL.md on write
update.ts:234-253 lockfile entry updated with new SHA, timestamp, files, then writeLockfile()
commands.md:598-604 documents frontmatter normalization for non-Claude adapters
vskill-cli.md:230-258 documents default update-all and local:specweave support

findings.title: installation.md still shows vskill update --all as required
findings.issue: Shows 'vskill update --all' as the way to update all skills, while code now defaults to all without the flag
findings.suggestion: Update to show bare 'vskill update' as the default
findings.impact: Minor documentation inconsistency; --all still works so users are not blocked
